chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.2207 of 2024 14.10.2024 Mr. Shafqat Gul, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Adnan Ahmed advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant. Mr. Amna Ansari, Addl. P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Asif Shabbir is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.257/2024 U/s 489-F PPC of P.S. Madina Colony, Karachi. 2. Complainant has alleged in FIR that he had invested an amount of rs.20,00,000/- in the business of the accused against monthly profit which when applicant did not pay to him, he demanded his amount back and applicant issued him a cheque of Rs.10,00,000/- which on presentation in bank was dishonored. Applicant was arrested on 31.07.2024 and is in jail since then. 3. Learned counsel for applicant submits that offence is punishable only for three years and applicant is ready to furnish security of the same amount. Learned counsel for complainant and learned Addl. P.G have opposed but bail. But since the applicant is ready to furnish security of the same amount, and the case has already been challaned; the offence is punishable only for three years, this application is allowed and the applicant is granted bail subject to furnishing security of Rs.10,00,000/- and P.R bond in the same amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
